/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch x86_64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/clibench.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/clibench.dir/src/vulkan_context.cpp.o CMakeFiles/clibench.dir/src/cpu_benchmark.cpp.o CMakeFiles/clibench.dir/src/compute_benchmark.cpp.o CMakeFiles/clibench.dir/src/memory_benchmark.cpp.o CMakeFiles/clibench.dir/src/graphics_benchmark.cpp.o CMakeFiles/clibench.dir/src/stress_benchmark.cpp.o CMakeFiles/clibench.dir/src/result_reporter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/clibench.dir/src/metal_context.mm.o CMakeFiles/clibench.dir/src/metal_compute_benchmark.mm.o CMakeFiles/clibench.dir/src/metal_memory_benchmark.mm.o CMakeFiles/clibench.dir/src/metal_graphics_benchmark.mm.o -o clibench  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libvulkan.dylib /usr/local/lib/libglfw.3.4.dylib -framework QuartzCore -framework Metal -framework Foundation
